meta.title: NetWalking | Tokyo's Walking Community for Meaningful Connections
meta.description: Join NetWalking for bilingual, family-friendly networking walks across Tokyo. Meet founders, freelancers, and globally minded parents while exploring the city.
meta.ogDescription: Discover NetWalking's bilingual walks across Tokyo. Build authentic relationships while exploring the city together.

hero.tagline: Building stronger relationships, step by step.
hero.subtitle: 5K walks with Tokyo's most awesome people. Monthly, 12-2pm. Free!

whatThisIs.heading: What This Is
whatThisIs.pitch: A monthly walking community in Tokyo. Founders, freelancers, and parents walk 5km together, have real conversations, and make lasting connections. Starts at noon, always free, bilingual.
whatThisIs.dadAngle: I'm an entrepreneur, but I'm also a dad. I want to be home for dinner and tuck in my kids every night. So instead of typical after-work networking, I made the afternoon, open-air version.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Title: Show up at the meeting point
howItWorks.step1Desc: We wait 20-30 minutes at the start, so no stress if you're a bit late.
howItWorks.step2Desc: About two hours, roughly 5km. Just walk, talk, and enjoy the city.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Partway through we do quick intros: name, time in Japan, when people should call you. At the end, exchange contacts.

footer.blurb: NetWalking is a monthly walk in Tokyo. We're a community that connects, converses, and explores the city together. Always friendly, always free!

playbook.title: NetWalking: How To Run Your Own
